feature.name: Gamepad ongamepadconnected and ongamepaddisconnected event handler attributes
feature.creator: orko@igalia.com
feature.summary:
Add ongamepadconnected and ongamepaddisconnected event handlers to the WindowEventHandlers interface mixin.

This would enable support for window.ongamepad[dis]connected or document.body.ongamepad[dis]connected event handler attributes.

intake.finding:
ChromeStatus record (created 2025-09-26 by orko@igalia.com). Add ongamepadconnected and ongamepaddisconnected event handlers to the WindowEventHandlers interface mixin.

This would enable support for window.ongamepad[dis]connected or document.body.ongamepad[dis]connected event handler attributes. Category: Device. Blink component: Blink>GamepadAPI. Stars: 66.
intake.limitations: ChromeStatus record fields only; intent thread content not directly accessible.
